evidence: The global_summary ranks features by mean_abs_shap. late_payments is 0.31, credit_utilization is 0.24, and stable_income is 0.17, so the top-two margin is 0.31 - 0.24 = 0.07. post_approval_call_count is lower at 0.09 but is still a review risk because the note says it is only known after the loan decision.
